titleStmt.title: SII 8.184: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 184. (A.R. No. 588 of 1902). ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE VISHVAKSENA SHRINE IN THE SUNDARARAJA-PERUMAL TEMPLE AT ANBIL, TRICHINOPOLY TALUK, TRICHINOPOLY DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
sva
sti śrī .
kopparakecaripanma ṟku yāṇṭu 5- ñcāvatu muṭaiyāṉ tirayyaṉ paṉaiya ṉuḷḷiṭṭa Ūrom tevarkku tiruvamutu santi nāṉāḻi ṟuṇi nāṉāḻikku Aiñciraṇṭāka Ariciyāl vanta nel Oru nāḷaikku mukkuṟuṇi Aṟunāḻi
yāka Ōrāṇṭu 3 100 6 10 nāḷaikku vanta nel nūṟṟorupattiru kalaṉey tūṇip patakku nañ ceyta nilamāvatu tiruk māvukku kallai kuḷavāykkālukku mekku lukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Ūrvāykkālukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkkellai
tirunantavāṉattukkut teṟkku yivvicaitta perunānkellaiyuḷ ḷuṭppaṭṭa nilam nānkumāk kāṇikku kiḻpāṟkkellai kuḻi munṟumāvukku mekkum tenpāṟkellai kāṟceykku vaṭakku melpā lukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Ukaccan mūnṟumāvukkut teṟkkum mi(y)vvicaitta perunān
kellaiyuḷ Uṭpaṭṭa lam kāle yaraiymāvukku kiḻpāṟkellai Araiye yaraikkālukku mekkum tenpāṟkellai kāṟceykku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai nāṉkumākkāṇi ṭuvilvāykkālukkut teṟkkum yivvicaitta perunāṉkellaiyuḷ ḷuṭpaṭṭa nilamum
pāmpuṇikiḻāṉ vayakkal varavai kāṇinilam Oṉpatumāvukku kiḻpāṟkellai palavaravai lukku mekkum teṉpāṟkellai peruvaḻikku vaṭakkum melpārkkellai tirumāle �lukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkke kkā(l)lukkut teṟkum Ivvicaitta perunāṉkellaiyuḷ ḷuṭpaṭṭa nilamum Iraṇṭumāvukku
kellai kāṟceykku mekkum teṉpāṟkellai munṟumāvukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai mayakkal vāykkā(l)lukku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai nānkumākkāṇikku teṟkum Ivvicaitta
lukku nicatam nāṭuriyum canti munṟiṉukku Aṭaikkāy Amutu Āṟukku nicatam nānāḻi yuriyum Āka Eṟṟi nel munnāḻi Āka Āṇṭuvaraikku vanta ḷa3 ka mukkuṟuṇi nikki ninṟa ḷa9� yinā
kkum tenpāṟkkellai vaṭṭamummāvaraikku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Iraṇṭu māvukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai cevakan Araikkālukku teṟkkum miyvi
vāy muṉṟumāvukku melpāṟkellai Ūrvāykkālukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Ūrvāykkālil pirinta vāykkālukkut teṟkum kiḻpārkkellai kuḷaṅkaraiṣome inscribed stones are missing in the middle and the end of the inscription.
Digital edition of SII 8.184 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
